name: Process Injection Sequence - Handle Open Then Remote Thread Creation
description: Detects process injection: suspicious process opens full-access handle to another process (EID 10) then creates remote thread (EID 8) within 10 seconds. Covers Fawkes vanilla-injection and apc-injection.
query:
sequence by host.name with maxspan=10s
  [process where event.code == "10" and
    winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess in
      ("0x1F0FFF", "0x1F3FFF", "0x001F0FFF", "0x143A", "0x40", "0x1410") and
    not process.executable : ("*\\MsMpEng.exe", "*\\csrss.exe",
                               "*\\svchost.exe", "*\\lsass.exe",
                               "*\\WerFault.exe", "*\\SearchIndexer.exe")]
  [process where event.code == "8" and
    not process.executable : ("*\\MsMpEng.exe", "*\\csrss.exe",
                               "*\\svchost.exe", "*\\WUDFHost.exe")]
